title: euodia sapotifolia
intro: Euodia sapotifolia, also known as Tamaulipan Euodia, is a flowering plant species native to southeastern Mexico and northern parts of Central America. This plant is a member of the Rutaceae family and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Euodia sapotifolia include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce pain. Herbal preparations of Euodia sapotifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
